temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a light-colored shirt and dark tie, with a serious expression, walks into a modern, glass-walled conference room. Three men in uniform are seated around a long table, watching him approach. (Storyline: A new character is introduced as he enters a formal, high-stakes environment, immediately creating a sense of tension and anticipation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, and suspenseful musical score begins to play.)
(00:03-00:05) The man, who has a noticeable bruise under his left eye, stands before the seated officials. He looks down with a somber and resigned expression as he speaks. (Storyline: The character's bruised face and somber demeanor suggest he is in trouble and is about to confess or explain his actions.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Subdued, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, suspenseful music continues.)
